data.name: Tequila Sunrise
data.detailed_description:
特色列表


關於此遊戲

After sustaining a career-ending injury, Manchester Wanderers Midfielder Robert Finch is at a loss what to do with his life. A mid-afternoon pint at his local pub and a chance meeting with a beautiful business magnate leads to a new opportunity for this hapless ex-athlete.

Tequila Sunrise is a romantic comedy dating sim where you play as Robert Finch, ex-football player and current club promoter for “Tequila Sunrise” the newest, and hopefully soon-to-be trendiest, nightclub in Manchester. Weave your way around Cheshire high-society and see what you can do to help your new employer.

Will your nightclub take off and be the toast of Manchester?

Will you survive the social jungle that is high-society?

Will you find love along the way?

Find out by playing “Tequila Sunrise”!

Featuring:

- A Charming and Hilarious Story

- Beautiful Anime Style Art

- Cool Smooth Jazz and RnB Soundtrack

- Multiple Endings

data.short_description: Tequila Sunrise is a romantic comedy dating sim where you play as Robert Finch, ex-football player and current club promoter for “Tequila Sunrise” the newest, and hopefully soon-to-be trendiest, nightclub in Manchester.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Microsoft Windows Vista / 7 / 8 / 10
  • 處理器: 1.5Ghz Processor or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6 and above
  • 處理器: 1.5GHz Intel Core 2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics Chip
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
